    Controller responsible for building and managing the playback panel UI.

    Time Complexity: O(1) for all operations Space Complexity: O(1)

    Configuration for player panel sizing.

    Defines the two supported rendering sizes for the playback panel.

    JPA entity representing a user-created playlist.

    Top-level controller for the Playlist page.

    PlaylistDialogHandler - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.playlist
    Handles all playlist-related dialogs (create, rename, delete).
    PlaylistRepository - Interface in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.repository
    Spring Data JPA repository for Playlist entities.
    playlistService() - Method in record class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.LibraryHandler
    Returns the value of the playlistService record component.
    PlaylistService - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service
    Time Complexity: Create/delete: O(1) single database operation Add/remove song: O(1) list manipulation in memory Get playlists: O(n) where n = user's playlists Space Complexity: O(n) where n = playlist size (songs in playlist)
    PlaylistService() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.PlaylistService

    Builds all JavaFX nodes for the Playlist screen.
